zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Briwere II於1145年8月22日出生在英國英格蘭戴文斯托克 達莫勒爾時，他的父親Sir Henry De Briwere Of Stoke31歲，母親Joan Redvers De Vernon30歲。他和Beatrice de Vaux至少有2個兒子和6個女兒。他於1189年被列為justice itinerant 。他去世於1226年11月24日在英國英格蘭德比夏爾貝爾培享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文登可斯維爾 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Briwere II于1145年8月22日出生在英国英格兰戴文斯托克 達莫勒爾时，他的父亲Sir Henry De Briwere Of Stoke31岁，母亲Joan Redvers De Vernon30岁。他和Beatrice de Vaux至少有2个儿子和6个女儿。他于1189年被列为justice itinerant 。他去世于1226年11月24日在英国英格兰德比夏爾貝爾培享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文登可斯維爾 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Briwere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Pierre, Adrien, Aurele, Benedicte, Benoit, Colette, Fernand, Gaston, Marcel, Micheline.

French (Brière): topographic name from a regional variant of Old French bruiere ‘heather’ (see Bruyere ), or a habitational name from La Brière, the name of several places mainly in the northern part of France, from the same word.
History: Jean Brière from Clarbec in Calvados, France, married Jeanne Grandin in Quebec City, QC, in 1671.

variants.name: Bruyere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Fernand, Jacques, Marcel.

French (Bruyère): from Old French bruiere ‘heather’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived in a place where heather grew, or a habitational name from one of the places in France (for example in Calvados) named with this word. Compare Labruyere .
Altered form (Bruyère) of French Bruguier: habitational name from (Le) Bruguier, the name of several places in the southeastern part of France, a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Briwere II was born on 22 August 1145, in Stoke Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Henry De Briwere Of Stoke, was 31 and his mother, Joan Redvers De Vernon, was 30. He had at least 2 sons and 6 daughters with Beatrice de Vaux. In 1189, at the age of 44, his occupation is listed as justice itinerant . He died on 24 November 1226, in Belper, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81, and was buried in Dunkeswell Abbey, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Briwere II est né le 22 août 1145, à Stoke Damerel, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry De Briwere Of Stoke, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Redvers De Vernon, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles avec Beatrice de Vaux. En 1189, à l’âge de 44 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justice itinerant . Il est décédé le 24 novembre 1226, à Belper, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Dunkeswell Abbey, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Briwere II am 22. August 1145 in Stoke Damerel, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry De Briwere Of Stoke 31 und seine Mutter Joan Redvers De Vernon 30. Er hatte mit Beatrice de Vaux mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1189, als er 44 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justice itinerant  aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. November 1226 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Belper, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dunkeswell Abbey, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Briwere II è nato il il 22 agosto 1145 nel Stoke Damerel, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Henry De Briwere Of Stoke, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Redvers De Vernon, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie con Beatrice de Vaux. Nel 1189, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice itinerant . Morì il 24 novembre 1226, nel Belper, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Dunkeswell Abbey, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Briwere IIが1145年8月22日にイギリスイギリスデボンストク ダムレルで生まれた時，父Sir Henry De Briwere Of Stokeは31歳，母Joan Redvers De Vernonは30歳であった。彼はBeatrice de Vauxとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。1189年，44歳の時，職業はjustice itinerant と記録されている。彼は1226年11月24日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアベルペルで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンダンケスウエル アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Briwere II(이)가 1145년 8월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 스토크 다머에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry De Briwere Of Stoke(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Redvers De Vernon(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Beatrice de Vaux(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1189년, 44세의 나이로 그의 직업은 justice itinerant 이었다. 그는 1226년 11월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 벨퍼에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 던케스웰 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Briwere II nasceu em 22 de agosto de 1145, em Stoke Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry De Briwere Of Stoke, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Redvers De Vernon, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas com Beatrice de Vaux. Em 1189, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como justice itinerant . Ele faleceu em 24 de novembro de 1226, em Belper, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Dunkeswell Abbey, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Briwere II родился 22 августа 1145 г. в местности сток дэмирэл, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Henry De Briwere Of Stoke было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Redvers De Vernon, 30. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей от Beatrice de Vaux. В 1189 году, в возрасте 44 лет,  он работал по профессии justice itinerant . Он умер 24 ноября 1226 г. в местности белпир, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности дункесвелл эбби, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Briwere II nació el 22 de agosto de 1145, en Stoke Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Henry De Briwere Of Stoke, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan Redvers De Vernon, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas con Beatrice de Vaux. En 1189, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era justice itinerant . Murió el 24 de noviembre de 1226, en Belper, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Dunkeswell Abbey, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
